name: Source-0050 Distillation Package — Structural Placeholder
narrative_summary: Complete distillation failure across 14 volumes (348 chapters). All constituent chapter_cards and volume_cards returned LLM unavailable fallback stubs with 0.0 confidence. No extractable arc functions, dominant engines, state progressions, turning points, reusable mechanisms, craft observations, reader rewards, or open hooks. Book_design_card and Author_craft_card cannot be meaningfully generated. Source must be reprocessed with LLM access enabled before any design fingerprint or craft fingerprint can be produced.
